MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Craig K. Martin, Esq. of 245-2300, for plaintiff and moving party
Jonathan T. Rodriguez, Esq. of SEDGWICK, DETERT 781-7900, for defendants and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court heard PLAINTIFF AISHA GILMORE For Relief Of The Courts Order Striking Punitive Damages And Sustaining Demurs To The Fourth Fifth Seventh Eighth Ninth And Tenth Causes Of Action. The Court ordered stricken plaintiff's second amended complaint. Only causes of action 1, 2, 3 and 6 remain. Plaintiff has leave to move to amend to add claims for fraud and physical disability if there is a good faith factual basis. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
